offer: For insurance agency owners processing 5–15 clients/month, compliance reporting delays cause regulatory penalties. We generate custom compliance reports instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in generating compliance reports that meet state regulations.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance agency owners
Indie Hackers discussions on compliance reporting
DM outreach to insurance agency owners with demo video
Engage in community forums for insurance agency tools
try_it: Let users try customizable report templates and regulation database
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the reporting process
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing client data
Allow one-click export of basic reports
